{{Quote|The vote was wrong! ''[…]'' To allow the Bothans to escape proper punishment will merely encourage further atrocities like Caamas in the future. The Sif'krie government must be made aware of that and given the opportunity to change its vote.|Plarx, to General Garm Bel Iblis|<ref name="Specter" />}}
'''Plarx''' was a [[Frezh]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] the Frezh [[Blockade of Sif'kric|blockade]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sif'kric]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sif'krie]] [[Species/Legends|species]], during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]]<ref name="Specter" /> in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. During the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="TERC">The events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' are dated to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] arrived at the planet, and Plarx explained his people's motives to [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] Sif'kric to Republic [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis]]. According to the Frezh, the Sif'krie had stopped the [[Unidentified Frezh senator|Frezh senator]] from supporting the anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Drashtine Initiative]], which would punish the Bothan species for [[Caamas Firestorm|destroying]] the planet [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] as the commander of the blockade desired.<ref name="Specter" />

As Bel Iblis could not legally intervene, the general ordered [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to study a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] that he suspected could be connected to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Booster Terrik]] as an excuse to break Plarx's blockade. While the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] passed through the blockade, its commander opened fire, giving the general a more legitimate excuse to destroy the blockading forces. After the Frezh commander's blockade was broken, the Frezh government complained to Republic [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]].<ref name="Specter" />

==Behind the scenes==
Plarx appeared in the [[1997]] novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', the first volume in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]''.<ref name="Specter" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
